test-case.name: ClaimReward_RejectsReward_IfMarkedAsCombatPower
test-case.output: [BattlePassManager] DESIGN VIOLATION: Tier 2 premium reward grants combat power. This is not allowed.

test-case.name: ClaimReward_ReturnsNull_WhenPremiumNotActive_ForPremiumReward
test-case.output: [BattlePassManager] Cannot claim premium reward: premium not active

test-case.name: ClaimReward_ReturnsNull_WhenTierNotReached
test-case.output: [BattlePassManager] Cannot claim tier 1 reward: current tier is 0

test-case.name: OnPurchaseDeferred_AddsToPendingQueue_WhenReceiptValid
test-case.output: [IAPManager] Stub: Would validate receipt for 'bp' on AppleAppStore with transaction 'txn_1'.

test-case.name: OnPurchaseDeferred_DoesNotAddToPending_WhenReceiptEmpty
test-case.output: [IAPManager] Purchase txn_1 has empty receipt. Skipping.

test-case.name: OnServerValidationFailed_FiresOnPurchaseFailedEvent
test-case.output: [IAPManager] Receipt validation failed for bp_premium / txn_1: Invalid receipt.

test-case.name: OnServerValidationFailed_RemovesFromPendingQueue
test-case.output: [IAPManager] Stub: Would validate receipt for 'bp' on GooglePlayStore with transaction 'txn_1'. [IAPManager] Receipt validation failed for bp / txn_1: Receipt already consumed.

test-case.name: OnServerValidationSuccess_RemovesFromPendingQueue
test-case.output: [IAPManager] Stub: Would validate receipt for 'bp' on AppleAppStore with transaction 'txn_1'.
